feed-card: background: var(--canvas); padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--divider);
avatar: width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--orange), #FF8043); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0;
author: flex: 1; margin-left: 10px;
activity-title: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink); margin: 8px 0 8px; letter-spacing: -0.2px;
stat-label: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-2); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px;
stat-value: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); margin-top: 2px; letter-spacing: -0.3px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
ach: background: rgba(252,76,2,0.08); border-radius: 999px; padding: 3px 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
count: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
view-link: margin-left: auto; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--orange);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--ink-2); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; flex: 1;
